mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.member_nickname, CASE WHEN r.report_status IS NULL THEN -1 ELSE r.report_status END AS report_status FROM comment c INNER JOIN member m ON c.member_idx = m.member_idx LEFT JOIN report r ON c.comment_idx = r.comment_idx AND r.target_type = 'COMMENT' WHERE c.post_idx = #{post_idx} ORDER BY c.comment_created_at ASC
